deal.title: Regular Massage (30 minutes) at Sakura Spa
deal.description: 30-minute Regular Massage: Classic relaxation massage using smooth, flowing strokes to ease tension and promote overall well-being in a peaceful spa setting
highlights: Professional 30-minute massage therapy sessions perfect for busy schedules
Choose from relaxing regular massage, therapeutic deep tissue, or soothing hot stone treatments
Experienced massage therapists in a tranquil spa environment
Convenient Yonge Street location in Barrie with easy access
Ideal for stress relief, muscle tension, and overall wellness

services.name: Regular Massage (30 minutes)
services.description: 30-minute Regular Massage: Classic relaxation massage using smooth, flowing strokes to ease tension and promote overall well-being in a peaceful spa setting

services.name: Deep Tissue Massage (30 minutes)
services.description: 30-minute Deep Tissue Massage: Targeted therapeutic massage focusing on deeper muscle layers to address chronic tension, knots, and specific problem areas

services.name: Hot Stone Massage (30 minutes)
services.description: 30-minute Hot Stone Massage: Luxurious treatment combining traditional massage techniques with heated stones to deeply relax muscles and enhance circulation

fine_print.cancellation_policy: 24-hour cancellation policy. No-shows will forfeit their voucher.

voucher_instructions.instructions: Visit at 384 Yonge St #12, Barrie, ON L4N 4C8

intake.business_description: Sakura Spa is a professional massage therapy business specializing in relaxation and therapeutic treatments. We offer a range of massage services including regular massage, deep tissue massage, and hot stone massage to help clients unwind and address their wellness needs.
intake.services: Regular Massage (30 minutes), Deep Tissue Massage (30 minutes), Hot Stone Massage (30 minutes)
